name: Alligator Eggs
recipeIngredient: 36 large Jalapeno chilies, roasted and peeled
1/2 lb Cooked, peeled and deveined shrimp, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a small, sharp knife, cut a 1.5-inch slit at the stem end on one side of each chili.
2. Scrape out seeds without tearing stems. Rinse chilies to remove any debris.
3. Drain chilies on towels and mix the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
4. Season the filling with salt and pepper.
5. Spoon about 1 tablespoon into each chili, ensuring not to overstuff; the chili should close properly.
6. Arrange chilies on a baking sheet and refrigerate until ready to serve.
7. Heat vegetable oil in a heavy large skillet to 350°F (175°C).
8. Dredge each chili completely in the mixture, coating evenly.
9. Add chilies to the skillet in batches, without overcrowding, and fry until golden brown, turning once, about five minutes.
10. Drain on paper towels and serve.
